title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Axe India in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!
